metadata.title: Mallouka Motors | Allo Casse Auto | Imported Engines & Automotive Spare Parts in Tunisia
metadata.description: Trusted Automotive Specialists Since 2003. Mallouka Motors (formerly Allo Casse Auto) offers imported engines, gearboxes, spare parts, and professional mechanical workshop services in Tunisia.
metadata.keywords: Mallouka Motors, Allo Casse Auto, Imported Engines Tunisia, Used Engines Tunisia, Automotive Spare Parts Tunisia, Mechanical Workshop Tunisia

hero.title: Mallouka Motors
hero.tagline: Known for years as Allo Casse Auto
hero.subtitle: Trusted Automotive Specialists Since 2003

brands.title: Trusted Brands
brands.subtitle: We work with the world's leading automotive brands

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your Trusted Automotive Partner
about.description: Mallouka Motors, formerly known as Allo Casse Auto, has been serving Tunisia's automotive needs since 2003. We specialize in importing high-quality engines, gearboxes, and spare parts from Europe, providing our customers with reliable solutions for their vehicles.
about.missionText: To provide premium automotive parts and services with unmatched quality and customer service.
about.visionText: To be Tunisia's leading provider of imported automotive parts and mechanical services.

2003.title: Marsa Casse
2003.description: Founded as Marsa Casse, beginning our journey in automotive services.

2012.title: Allo Casse Auto
2012.description: Rebranded as Allo Casse Auto, expanding our services and reach.

2020.title: Mallouka Motors
2020.description: Evolved into Mallouka Motors, offering comprehensive automotive solutions.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive Automotive Solutions
services.gearboxesDesc: Reliable transmission systems for all vehicle types

process.title: Engine Import Process
process.subtitle: How We Source Quality Engines
process.step1Desc: We source engines from France, Belgium, Germany, Italy, and Spain
process.step2Desc: Each engine undergoes rigorous quality inspection
process.step3Desc: Secure shipping to Tunisia with proper documentation
process.step4Desc: Professional installation by our expert team

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Us
whyChoose.subtitle: The Mallouka Motors Advantage
whyChoose.qualityDesc: Only the best parts from trusted European sources
whyChoose.experienceDesc: Decades of expertise in automotive services
whyChoose.warrantyDesc: Peace of mind with our warranty coverage
whyChoose.supportDesc: Knowledgeable team ready to assist you

workshop.title: Mechanical Workshop
workshop.subtitle: Branch 2 - Professional Services
workshop.description: Our second branch offers comprehensive mechanical workshop services with state-of-the-art equipment and experienced technicians.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by Thousands
testimonials.customer1: Excellent service and quality parts. Highly recommended!
testimonials.customer2: Professional team with great expertise. Saved me time and money.
testimonials.customer3: Best place for imported engines in Tunisia. Very reliable.
testimonials.customer4: Outstanding customer service and fast delivery.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common Questions About Our Services
faq.q1: What types of engines do you import?
faq.a1: We import various types of engines including petrol, diesel, and hybrid engines from reputable European sources.
faq.a2: Yes, we provide professional engine installation services at our mechanical workshop.
faq.a3: We offer warranty coverage on our engines and parts. Contact us for specific warranty terms.
faq.a4: Shipping times vary depending on the source country and availability. We provide estimated delivery times for each order.
faq.q5: Do you ship to other countries?
faq.a5: Yes, we serve multiple countries. Contact us to check if we ship to your location.

footer.aboutText: Trusted automotive specialists since 2003. Your partner for quality engines, gearboxes, and spare parts.
